metaTitle: Instagram Post Generator — Realistic Fake Post Maker (Free & Private)
metaDescription: Create high-fidelity fake Instagram posts instantly in your browser. Customize UI, themes, captions, and likes. 100% private — your photos never leave your device.
introSummary: Our professional Instagram Post Generator is the ultimate tool for designers, marketers, and content creators. Whether you're building a social media mockup for a client presentation, testing ad copy, or creating fun content for friends, our generator provides a pixel-perfect Instagram UI. Featuring both Light and Dark mode support, it allows you to simulate a real Instagram environment entirely within your browser, ensuring absolute privacy for your uploaded assets.

contextUsage.title: For Marketing & Ad Testing
contextUsage.desc: Visualize how your brand's creative assets and captions will look in a real Instagram feed before launching expensive ad campaigns.

contextUsage.title: For Designers & UX/UI Prototyping
contextUsage.desc: Quickly generate high-quality social media screenshots for website placeholders, app presentations, or digital portfolios.

contextUsage.title: For Creative Storytelling
contextUsage.desc: Create engaging 'fake' social media interactions for digital novels, educational role-plays, or harmless pranks with friends.

howto.description: Enter the username, location, and caption. You can even customize the number of likes and comments to make it look viral.
Select an avatar and a main post image (1:1 recommended). Our 'Zero-Upload' technology ensures these files stay in your browser memory.
Switch between Light Mode and Dark Mode to match your design aesthetic or to see how the post looks in different system settings.
Click 'Save' to render the post into a clean, watermark-free PNG file that is ready for instant download and sharing.

why: Pixel-Perfect Accuracy — Designed to mirror the current Instagram UI layout for the most realistic screenshots possible.
Dual Theme Support — Easily switch between Light and Dark mode to create versatile mockups for any device environment.
Total Data Privacy — No images or text data are ever sent to a server. Everything is rendered locally using HTML5 Canvas.
No Watermarks — Download clean, professional-grade images without any branding or hidden logos, completely free of charge.
Instant Real-Time Preview — See every change to your caption, username, or like count reflected immediately on the screen.
Offline Functionality — After the initial load, the tool works 100% offline, making it a reliable utility wherever you are.

faq.q: Can I use my own photos for the post?
faq.a: Yes! You can upload any JPG, PNG, or WebP image from your device. Since it's a 'Serverless' tool, your photos are never stored or seen by anyone else.

faq.q: Is the output image high enough quality for presentations?
faq.a: Absolutely. The generator renders a high-resolution PNG file that remains crisp and clear in professional slide decks or design documents.

faq.q: Does this tool support emojis in captions?
faq.a: Yes. Our text engine supports standard system emojis, allowing you to create realistic and expressive social media captions.

faq.q: Can I make a fake Instagram Story too?
faq.a: This tool is specialized for Feed Posts. For vertical content, we recommend using our upcoming 'Story Generator' or cropping your image to 9:16 before uploading.

faq.q: Is it legal to create fake posts?
faq.a: This tool is intended for creative, educational, and entertainment purposes. Users are responsible for ensuring their content does not violate laws or platform policies regarding misinformation.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Seamless switching between Light and Dark system styles
Ensures zero data traces are left on the server
Professional quality for marketing and UI mockups

troubleshooting: Preview not updating? Refresh the page and ensure JavaScript is enabled. Large image files might take a split second to render in the browser.
Text looks different? The tool uses your system's default sans-serif fonts to mimic the native look of social media apps as closely as possible.
Download failed? Some mobile browsers require you to 'Long Press' the image to save it. On desktop, check your browser's download permissions.
proTips: For the most realistic look, use a high-quality 1080x1080 pixel square image for your post content.
Marketing Tip: Use the 'Dark Mode' toggle to create contrasting ad variations and see which one grabs more attention in your pitch deck.
Use a verified badge emoji or custom icons in your username field (if supported) to create 'Influencer' style mockups instantly.
